kernel_subject: workqueue: Replace deprecated ida_simple_*() with ida_alloc()/ida_free()
stage1_reason: Direct replacement of deprecated ida_simple_get/remove with ida_alloc/free as stated in commit message
stage2_reason: Driver commit explicitly replaces deprecated ida_simple_get/remove with ida_alloc/free, matching kernel commit's stated purpose and keywords. Kernel commit predates driver migration range (v5.14-5.15 vs v5.19-6.0), establishing clear causal relationship.
